message:
feat(engine): module system — async evaluation dependency tracking and compatibility matrix validation

module_async_evaluation:
- Track rejected dependencies separately from in-progress ones during
  register_module; previously both were lumped into pending_dependencies
  without distinguishing failure modes
- Emit DependencySuspended events for each awaiting dependency at register time
- When a rejected dependency is found, immediately propagate rejection to the
  dependent module with the rejection reason hash and description
- Set AwaitingDependencies phase for sync modules that have pending deps
- Reorder state insertion before event emission for consistency

module_compatibility_matrix:
- Add validation that documented divergence entries must have non-empty
  reason and impact fields; previously only migration_guidance was checked,
  allowing divergences to be registered without explaining why they exist
  or what their impact is
- Both new checks use InvalidMatrix error code with descriptive messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
